name: thoth
description: Cross-agent workflows for autonomous maintainability and measured performance cycles, plus documentation cleanup.

interface.longDescription: Run autonomous maintainability and measured performance cycles, and remove noisy code comments through workflows shared by Claude Code and Codex.
defaultPrompt: Audit the most relevant area for maintainability issues.
Create a goal and complete an autonomous maintainability cycle with final scoped documentation cleanup.
Measure the most relevant performance hotspot and track verified findings.
Create a goal and complete one autonomous measured performance cycle.
Clean redundant comments from files changed in this session.
